overview: Frost Giant Berserker is a SubBoss-class Humanoid/Giant/Human monster found in Ice Cavern. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 700 HP, 19 physical damage, 200 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 4, MaxImpactEndurance 5. 6 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Ground Destroy at 200% ratio (380 base damage). Sight range 1200, combat radius 300.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 4 melee attacks. Combo1 L (170%), Combo1 R (170%), Combo2 L (180%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weakness: Fire
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Ice
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Ice (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Highest Damage: Ground Destroy (200% ratio)
strategies.description: Ground Destroy deals 380 damage at base (200% ratio). This is the most dangerous attack to avoid.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1200 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1200 units, loses target at 1900 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 300, ability check distance 400
strategies.description: Combat area radius 300. Ability check distance 400. Ability attack delay: 0.5s.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1200 units. Loses target at 1900 units.
